productDisplayName: Allen Solly Men Leather Brown Wallet
description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather wallet. With lots of space for all your monetary essentials and classy stitch detailing, this wallet in brown makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas two main compartmentsEight credit card slotsTwo slip pockets on either sideBrand name appliquéd on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 9.5 cm
